name: BaseBrick
description: Play BaseBrick and win milestone NFTs on Base Network. Fast arcade runs, instant retries, and claim moments at stages 5, 10, 15, and 20.
tagline: Play fast. Win NFTs on Base Network.

share.title: BaseBrick | Win NFTs on Base
share.textTemplate: I scored {{score}} in BaseBrick while chasing milestone NFTs on Base Network. Beat this run.

hooks.leaderboard: device-local leaderboard active; verified global API can replace fetchLeaderboard
hooks.scoreSubmit: wallet personal_sign flow active; backend/onchain relay can replace submitScore
hooks.dailyChallenge: seeded by local date; ready for remote seed endpoint
hooks.milestoneRewards: milestone claim proofs (5/10/15/20) are signed client-side and sync to reward backend when configured
hooks.siweAuth: optional SIWE auth flow active when authNonce/authVerify endpoints are configured
hooks.walletLayer: wallet adapter boundary auto-loads wallet-adapter.js (wagmi/viem/Base Account) with legacy injected fallback
